speaker: MATT
raw_text: As it does, you feel this strange, oppressive force come from the eye into your mind, and I need you to go ahead and roll a charisma saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That was just to see how much hit points it would affect if it was going to put him to sleep. But a nice try.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so that ends your turn. That brings us back to the top of the round between you guys. So we'll wait for the rest to arrive before we do full initiative. We're just running off of the sequence of events here. Did you want to move at all or are you going to stay right here?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to run as far away as possible from him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So, as you start running backward, we'll say to about there, he has a very long reach with a club and he gets to swing at you as a reaction. So as you go bolting, he just takes the giant club around (whoosh).

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're not groggy at all, you little--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Streaks it across the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're grappled.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep, which means he's in a bad situation and he, because he is grappled, it means he can't move from his current spot. He's being held in place. His speed is zero.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Checking the stats.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But he still manages to roll a 14 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And he doesn't hit me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so you jump over the club.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sweet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll off the ground, turn around. Get your bow back in ready position, untouched. That's the end of your turn. Now it's his turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He is going to-- Did you throw the daggers or did you leap up to try and backstab him there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I tried to backstab him so I'm right behind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, so you're right there. He--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He's gonna shit on me, isn't he?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: -- spins around. Bends down, just glares at you with his one giant yellowish eye with almost a slit pupil in it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hello, handsome.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Start making your way down. All right, everyone roll initiative, because K'Varn turns around immediately, and you hear this very familiar, deep voice echoing from within the chamber: "Naughty, naughty. I left the door open for you!" Everyone roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I going to aim and--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Un-Polymorph him.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: When he falls.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Right as he lets him go. We need the mass.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (yelps) Un-Polymorph!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, as the mouse descends out of the middle of the air, the Fomorian goes tumbling down, angrily cascading towards it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a falling giant.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do we have anything that is gonna stop us from falling towards our death?

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: We're on the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With a deafening crash sound, the Fomorian goes slamming into the glass. You hear the cracking and crashing sound of the planes as they shatter. The metal structure-- this horrible breaking, bending sound as they bend inward and slam the inside of the temple. The Fomorian, who's streaking down, slams into the ground from that height, taking--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The German judge doesn't like it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At that height, he is dead, even at his hit point level, he is right there on the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But because he is enchanted he can still attack, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, we splattered a giant, you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, is he dead?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yeah. He's meat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So as that happens, the entire structure tilts to the side. Part of it bends and kinda hits the side of the temple, and whatever strange green glow was at the top of the temple dissipates.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we should just go?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I swoop down and pick everybody up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Pick who up?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Not me, you don't pick me up. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You're way up here right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I know, I'm going to start to--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So, Scanlan, as you hold over the edge, you look down and you pull out the scroll and begin reading it, hopefully the arcane language will come to you. Bits of it seem familiar. I need you to go ahead and roll a d20 and add your ability modifier, which is five.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it's eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That does hit. All right, so on a hit the target takes 4d6 radiant damage and the next attack roll made against it has advantage, so go ahead and roll 4d6.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 damage. All right. So the next attack on him is at advantage. As a reaction, he's going to use one of his legendary actions on its turn to-- as it gets hit and dazed-- one of its eyestalks bends over again, the same one that hit you last time is going to attempt hit you again. Go ahead and make a strength saving throw again.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: He hit me again because I took a long time. But my strength is really low. 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14. The ray slams into you again and you feel yourself lift off your feet as the beam throws you across the room, slamming into the bars on the side. As you hit them, the impact doesn't do enough damage, but suddenly these two giant, fleshy arms reach through the bars and grab you and pull you against them. You take--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh boy. Our healer is about to die.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nine points of crushing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Nine?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, and you are currently grappled and held against the bars.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends the legendary action. And I think you've used your movement to get up. That's your turn. That gets us to Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Boy oh boy. You say you can take a hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Go for it! I'm also immune to a lot of shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Chain Lightning scroll. It's the biggest thing I have.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! Do it! Whatever that is!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a scroll of Chain Lightning. I can't cast it at my level so it's gonna be just a 50-50 shot whether it even works.
